vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1295 (feat(packs): skills-pack-0.1); part of the #742 decomposition.

narratives.Description: Blocked placeholder. Phase 2 of the vBRIEF-as-canonical rollout. Scope finalizes after Phase 1 (lessons-pack-0.1) closes.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Defer detailed implementation plan until Phase 1 closes. Expected items: define schema based on Phase 1 lessons, ship renderer + slice API, migrate ONE skill as proof, iterate.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent loading skill content, I want structured slice access to phases / anti-patterns / gates / chaining so I pay only for the slice I query.

items.title: Migrate ONE skill as proof, then iterate

narrative.Acceptance: task skill:slice <name> works on the proof skill.
